programme.title: Mrs Henderson Presents
programme.desc: 1937. Mrs Henderson, a woman of wealth and connections, has just buried her beloved husband. And now she's bored. Friends suggest she finds a hobby and to their amazement she buys the Windmill theatre. When business dips she comes up with a new idea to get the crowds back - put naked girls on stage! But when the government threatens to shut the theatre Mrs Henderson's fighting spirit is revealed.

programme.title: It's A Boy Girl Thing

programme.title: Bryan Johnson

programme.title: Billionaire Mom Cuts Off Her Children
programme.desc: A wealthy CEO fakes bankruptcy to teach her spoiled children the value of hard work. Her plan backfires when they discover her ruse, but the experience ultimately brings them closer as they embark on a new, shared venture.

programme.title: Girl Embraces Her Unibrow
programme.desc: An awkward, sweaty teen, Talia, is bullied by popular Hannah but finds allies in kindhearted Jared and confident Trevor. A dramatic makeover and a truth-revealing audio clip expose Hannah, empowering Talia and her new friends to embrace their authentic selves.

programme.title: Dad Disowns His Daughter
programme.desc: Brynn, a talented basketball player, struggles for her dad's approval, who favors her brother. After her dad reveals a heartbreaking secret, Brynn finds a mentor in her teacher, who helps her pursue basketball, leading her to professional success and a chance to prove her worth.

programme.title: Girl Stops At Nothing To Be Popular
programme.desc: Emily's attempt to impress popular sophomores by lying about driving her sister's car leads to a chaotic night with the police. Rescued by her sister and best friend, she learns the value of authenticity, ultimately catching the eye of a popular jock.

programme.title: Nerdy Girls vs Pretty Girls
programme.desc: Arika, a high school president, implements a "beauty tax" to balance perceived privileges of pretty girls, only to discover the complexities of judgment and the importance of self-worth and unity among all students.

programme.title: Kids Get Mom Fired
programme.desc: Zoe, upset her working mom has less time for her, tries to get her fired. After her plot backfires, revealing her mom's sacrifice, Zoe devises a plan to help her mom balance work and family, strengthening their bond.

programme.title: No One Picks Kid For Class Project
programme.desc: Bullied "dough boy" Joey, inspired by his athletic brother, transforms his mindset and body, excelling in science and earning respect. Though losing a swim race, his newfound confidence wins him the girl and leaves his bully stunned.

programme.title: Broke Kid Pretends To Be Rich For Girl
programme.desc: Ryan, a thoughtful but poor student, hides his true self to impress wealthy Chloe. After his deceit is exposed, he embraces authenticity, winning Chloe's heart with genuine gestures and proving that true connection outweighs superficiality.

programme.title: Sisters Compete For Boy's Love
programme.desc: Carter uses sweet, nerdy Tara to make his crush, Sara, jealous. When Sara's cruel nature is revealed, Carter realizes his mistake, choosing Tara's genuine kindness. He publicly rejects Sara, embracing authenticity and a heartfelt Valentine's Day with Tara.

programme.title: Popular Girl Has Secret Crush On Nerd
programme.desc: Bentley, a high school heartbreaker, makes a bet to win over Rose, enlisting her friend Reggie's help. Reggie's growing feelings for Rose and Bentley's deceit lead to a prom-night confrontation, exposing truths and revealing true connections.

programme.title: Girl Becomes Fake Wife For 180 Days
programme.desc: A talented but poor artist, Clarice, and Ken, a rich architect, fake a marriage for Ken's career. Lies unravel, but they learn true success comes from their own merit and mutual support, leading them to pursue their dreams together.

programme.title: Popular Guy Falls In Love With Shy Girl
programme.desc: Obsessive anime-lover Mina stalks Calvin, her crush, but his rejection and public humiliation crush her. Befriended by popular Ryan, she slowly falls for him, discovering he secretly reciprocates her intense admiration.

Zac has a hilarious reaction to Toxic Waste, Ryan tries her first-ever Twinkie, and they both can't get enough of British snacks!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Comedians James Acaster and Ed Gamble, the hosts of the brilliant Off Menu podcast, enjoy a battle of Posh vs Normal food, and take a real trip down memory lane with some iconic British snacks. programme.title: Snack Wars

Six-year-old twins, Naushi and Neave, try some brand-new snacks from around the world in this fun episode of Snack Wars: Kids! programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode of Minutes With, we sat down with American veteran Chris VanSant as he takes us through his remarkable career in the Delta Force. Chris reveals the rigorous selection process required to join the elite force and takes us inside combat situations, explaining the complex operations that led to the capture of Saddam Hussein and the 'deck of cards' during the invasion of Iraq. Chris explains how death, loss and guilt caught up with him after years of service, leading to a moment that changed his life forever and set him on a new path.

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Wonderful Wetlands
programme.desc: Water is the key to life. It provides a haven for countless plants and animals, everything from water-loving cats and predatory birds to killer dragonflies and carnivorous foliage. It can be a nursery, a migration stopover and a larder. And there's place where water is gathered, drained and stored for all to enjoy – the wetland. Wetlands are some of the most remarkable ecosystems in the natural world everything from dragonflies and bats to fish and amphibians can thrive thanks to the wonderful wetland.

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Giant Appetites
programme.desc: In an ever changing world food is one of the few constants – it's the driver for almost anything that creatures do. Appetites vary from species to species, but some seem to take more than their fair share

programme.title: Seasons of the Forest
programme.desc: No place on Earth is more changeable than the seasonal forest, undergoing radical transformations year after year. These adaptations to the seasons are what makes our woodlands so varied and dynamic a cycle of interwoven behaviors and practices ticking away like a Swiss watch to rejuvenate the landscape ready for the new year. To fully understand the stories of the great woodlands spend a year among the trees, watching the energetic and vibrant changes that mark the seasons of the forest.

programme.title: Nature's Most Dangerous
programme.desc: Who's not a thrill seeker among us? We humans love to put ourselves at risk and lap up the thrill of living dangerously. And to fuel our fetish for fear, we turn to the animal kingdom. But what is the truth behind the killers of the natural world? Do they live up to their reputations, and who really is the most dangerous? From killer crocs to ferocious big cats, we'll run you through the most dangerous teeth, fangs, stingers and bites in the animal kingdom. These are the deadliest animals on planet earth.

programme.title: Wonderful Wetlands
programme.desc: Water is the key to life. It provides a haven for countless plants and animals, everything from water-loving cats and predatory birds to killer dragonflies and carnivorous foliage. It can be a nursery, a migration stopover and a larder. And there's place where water is gathered, drained and stored for all to enjoy – the wetland. Wetlands are some of the most remarkable ecosystems in the natural world everything from dragonflies and bats to fish and amphibians can thrive thanks to the wonderful wetland.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series, we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect. Through the eyes of the local communities and the conservation bodies, we follow a trail along the major rivers, mountains and deserts to see what can be achieved if countries work together to conserve a shared heritage.

programme.title: Nuts about Squirrels
programme.desc: Squirrels have conquered tundra, deserts, forests and more, developing ingenious life skills along the way, from stashing nuts to fighting snakes.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: In the Centre for Rehabilitation of Wildlife situated in KwaZulu Natal, South Africa, junior nurse Kylie is preparing grey duiker Major for his release into the wild. Major had suffered several injuries when he arrived at the centre, but with Kylie's help he recovered, and he will soon be back in his natural environment. We also travel to the Eastern Cape in South Africa to the main port city called, Port Elizabeth. Here Ruth, a dedicated animal caretaker, is constantly monitoring her loggerhead turtle hatchling Rocky, who has trouble with weight fluctuations. But once his nutrition is balanced enough that he can keep his weight for several weeks, he can be released into the Indian Ocean.Deep in the Cameroonian jungles we meet Rachel, a committed caretaker of primates at the Mefoue Primate Sanctuary. She arrived at the centre sixteen years ago and decided to stay after Khan Daniel, a new-born silverback gorilla, chose her as his surrogate mother. Since then her passion for these animals grew stronger from day to day. Sixteen years later Khan Daniel is the leader of the gorilla troop while Rachel now runs the private facility caring for these gentle giants of the forest.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake. Europe's widest waterfall is located in Latvia. In the beginning of May, vimba bream follow the course of the River Venta. The hardly 5-centimetre-long fish have to overcome a 4-metre-long rock barrier in order to reach their spawning grounds.

programme.title: The Moor
programme.desc: Moors and peatlands are oases in the cultivated landscape of Central Europe.

programme.title: Bosnia Herzegovina
programme.desc: Wild and unknown lies the still undiscovered natural paradise of Bosnia and Herzegovina in the heart of Europe. Rough mountains, dense forests and wild waterfalls characterize the picture of the untouched landscapes. Lynx, wolves and bears roam mountains and valleys. One of the last primeval forests in Europe is a retreat for many endangered animal species. Bosnia and Herzegovina is actually an undiscovered natural paradise in the middle of Europe.

programme.title: Bosnia Herzegovina
programme.desc: The barren, karstic south of the country, Herzegovina, also impresses with its natural landscapes. One of them is the Livno field. Not only is it the largest wetland in the country, it is also the largest regularly flooded karst field in the world. About 700 wild horses live in this unique landscape. Their ancestors were working horses that were abandoned here more than 50 years ago. Another special feature of the karst landscape are the rivers with their tufa barriers. The countless waterfalls that pour over it are a unique natural phenomenon.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The Parque Nacional Peneda-Gerês is the only national park in Portugal. An area of almost 700 square kilometers, located in the extreme north of Portugal. Barren and rocky ridges in the plateaus, contrast with large forests and lush ground vegetation in deep valleys, crossed by lakes and rivers. The park is known for its oak forests, which are predominantly pedunculate and Pyrenean oaks. Among the typical animals of the park are the small Garrano ponies, a very old breed of horse and the only one in Europe that still lives in the wild.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The highest mountain range in Portugal is the Serra da Estrela. The episode embarks on a voyage of discovery to adventurous rock formations and villages steeped in tradition. The nature park is the largest protected area on the Iberian peninsula. In the mountain range we accompany the young scientist Ana Matos, who wants to breathe new life into old traditions, and cheese maker Maria Natália Lopes. She watches over more than 350 sheeps.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: In the southwest of Portugal lies the little known Parque Natural do Sudoeste Alentejano e Costa Vicentina. It encompasses a narrow coastal strip that runs along the coast to the south of Portugal. Sparsely populated, this coastal region, which was placed under protection in 1988, is considered one of the last intact ecosystems in Europe. The steep cliffs, the almost constant wind and high waves have ensured that mass tourism has not gained a foothold here. There are still near-natural forests and a diverse bird life.

programme.title: By Mail Ship through the South Seas
programme.desc: Surrounded by sharks, we cook Polynesian dishes with the supplies from the Aranui.

programme.title: By Mail Ship through the South Seas
programme.desc: On the neighboring island, we wander along the steep coast bringing the local fruit harvest to the Aranui.

programme.title: Marvellous French Rivers
programme.desc: The Gironde is the largest and most powerful tidal river in Europe and flows into the Atlantic.

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path
programme.desc: Lapland is a frozen, winterland of reindeer, Sami people and saunas. The brothers start in Stockholm and fly 200 kilometers straight north above the Arctic Circle. Their chosen mode of transport for this journey is a reindeer sleigh.,

programme.title: A Simple Path
programme.desc: Gaborone, Botswana is the turf of The Knuckelheads and unlikely skate spots, True-D fashion, traditional feasts, garage beats, inspiring street art and a fashion shoot in an abandoned building.,

programme.title: A Simple Path
programme.desc: Amidst the vast desert, we discover handmade leather shoes, the yellow bus on the beach, Kalahari truffles, the power of gemstones, keepers of the desert elephants and a skate ramp in the middle of the dunes.,

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: Dubai: 24 hour layover in the desert
programme.desc: Sashi is doing something he's never done! A layover style episode. He's got just 24 hours in the desert metropolis of Dubai. After seeking out the hive of human activity at Dubai's bustling souks, Sashi does the absolute opposite, by venturing out in the desert.,

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: The US Virgin Islands is one of the most popular destinations in the Caribbean - how about their cuisine? With a true blue Jeep 4x4, Sashi explores the chains of islands, learning stories of local cuisines, brand new distilleries and much more,

programme.title: Aerial Mountains: South Korea
programme.desc: Gracefully formed by the earth's tectonic forces and massive volcanic eruptions, the mountains are a fascinating natural phenomenon, and this aerial journey will seek to discover the spectacular mountains of South Korea.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali
programme.desc: In Bali's lush landscapes, Lauren explores the tropical origin of jackfruit, partnering with a Balinese chef to unveil age-old recipes and techniques, showcasing how this versatile fruit reigns supreme in traditional and modern dishes.,

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali
programme.desc: Delve into the world of rice with Lauren as she explores different varieties, shares tricks, and puts her own twist on unique rice-based dishes, blending local and western recipes to create flavorful meals like Balinese Nasi Goreng and Risotto.,

programme.title: Capturing Winter
programme.desc: Renowned winter photographer, Tristan Shu, attempts his dream project a photograph that combines astrophotography with action sports. His aim is to capture ski and snowboard tricks at night, set against the Milky-way and the spectacular Mont-Blanc.,

programme.title: The Streets
programme.desc: Rapper Shiniqua, aka Pretty Little Monster, juggles motherhood while trying to avoid the trappings of Instagram fame. Her passion is writing rap lyrics and always tries to keep it real.,

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: El Nino
programme.desc: Francisco Porcella displays the unquenchable spirit that drives the desire to chase big waves.,

programme.title: Marketplace Latin America
programme.desc: ​Marketplace Latin America premieres on CNN with a lineup of executives bringing their forward-thinking mindset to the global stage. Gathered at the annual Council of the Americas Symposium and 30th annual Bravo Awards, these innovative leaders share their playbooks for succeeding in challenging business climates with Gabriela Frías.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: As part of Inside Africa's 25th anniversary, we have a sit-down between two of the continent's most celebrated voices: Angelique Kidjo and Lupita Nyong'o. The setting is The Met's newly reimagined Arts of Africa gallery, a powerful space in which to reflect on African creativity, identity, and legacy. Five-time Grammy award winning Kidjo and Oscar-winning actor Nyong'o reflect on their careers and the rise and influence of African culture across the world.

programme.title: African Voices Changemakers
programme.desc: Ebuka Obi-Uchendu sits down with Larry Madowo to share how he went from a shy law graduate to the celebrated host of Big Brother Naija. We explore his bold fashion collaborations with designer Mai Atafo and the cultural stories behind his iconic style, plus a rare look at his home life, his advocacy for young boys and his growing influence.

programme.title: Walk of Art
programme.desc: We explore how art has influenced the cultural landscape of Qatar and how it can be an immersive experience for those who visit, live and work there. We meet designers and artists who reflect the country's layers of creativity, cultural diversity and modern identity. They guide us through Doha's open-air gallery, taking us to the public artwork that inspires them the most and represents a milestone in Qatar's artistic evolution. From Doha Mountains and Cesar's Pouce to remembering Qatar's pearl diving heritage and the first artistic landmark - the Museum of Islamic Art.

programme.title: Global Perspectives
programme.desc: Hosted by Zain Asher, this special half-hour program showcases the best of CNN's inaugural "Global Perspectives: On Africa" event, featuring interviews and session highlights with high profile political and business leaders, innovators and thought-leaders.

programme.desc: Bad luck! L.J. breaks a Shard-embedded mirror so Jade becomes a TROUBLE MAGNET while tracking the Shard. Worse, the evil Crimson Lord is back in town. Will Jade's luck turn around in time to win?

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The Crimson Lord uses a Shard-embedded megaphone to steal voices, including L.J.'s!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Newsflash: Jade Armor stole the Golden Dragon! L.J. is appalled. Who is the imposter making her look bad?

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Since breaking away from the Crimson Lord, Xinyan hates humans. When he gets his paws on a Shard that brings out people's animal natures, he wants to make Ban Tang into a Human Zoo.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: A Shard in Gram-Gram's dice is the centre of gravity. When the dice roll, so does the city! The stakes of a Mahjong game couldn't be higher.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: L.J. feels like a puppet on a string, pulled between teen and Jade life. But when a Shard in a singing bowl makes people mindless vessels, the Crimson Lord gets a puppet army at his fingertips.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The Memorial Fountain's not supposed to wipe memories, it's a Shard! As Jade works to save Ban Tang from amnesia, Black Tiger catnaps Baihu!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: When a journal contains a Shard that records the deepest secrets of anyone who touches it, L.J.'s identity as Jade is written in its pages!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: A size-changing Shard makes Xinyan HUGE and L.J. tiny. The big ape terrorizes Ban Tang to scare humans out of HIS habitat!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Theo's play is being put on - yay! But the auditions are awful - boo! When a Shard in a spotlight gives the illusion of talent, L.J. leaves it there to help Theo's show.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Theo's play is being put on - yay! But the auditions are awful - boo! When a Shard in a spotlight gives the illusion of talent, L.J. leaves it there to help Theo's show.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: L.J. and Theo pet a kitty and swap bodies! L.J. needs the cat's Shard but catching it is no easy feat.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: A Shard causes freak weather but the Beasticons aren't up for the hunt. When they go into a frozen state, Jade is desperate enough to leave them in Xinyan's "care."

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: After hours, Kai helps L.J. search the school for confiscated dice, using a Skeleton Key (Shard)!

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: The Surge
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd. Nowhere is safe but fortunately, the Ninja have been given the powerful Techno Blades. But the only problem is that they have no idea how to use them. Time has passed since the Ultimate Battle, and while the Golden Ninja continues to watch over Ninjago, the other Ninja have become complacent as schoolteachers. When a mysterious invitation from genius Cyrus Borg brings them to the futuristic New Ninjago City, trouble surges when a digital virus of the Overlord takes over technology. The Golden Ninja makes a heroic entrance, only to find out his Golden Power supercharges the enemy. Sensei Wu stays behind so that the Ninja can escape with the only thing that can save Ninjago's future – Borg's Techno Weapons.

programme.title: The Art Of The Silent Fist
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord's evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go. Their only chance is to learn the secrets of the Techno blades and use them to cut all power to save Ninjao from this technological menace. The Ninja hide out at a safe place void of technology – Sensei Garmadon's Sanctuary. That night, Zane is visited by Borg's female robo-assistant, Pixal. She warns them that the Digital Overlord is after Lloyd's Golden Power in order to become flesh, but the Techno Blades can reboot the system and erase him for good. After a highly advanced army of Nindroids attacks the Sanctuary, Lloyd flees with his father into the wilderness of Ninjago, while the rest set off on a quest to turn off all power in Ninjago, so that they can erase the Digital Overlord once and for all.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Peak Performance
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World, but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Inspired by fossils, Ratchet and Wheeljack build the Dinobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron scours the Andes in search of the Crystal of Power.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee tracks a traitor, remembering his first meeting with Bulkhead at Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Blackarachnia recruits Prometheus Black for an unknown, sinister purpose.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sari must defend the Autobots' base against an intrusion by the Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Decepticons kidnap Bulkhead to assist in Megatron's plan to conquer Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Conscrash lands on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime leads a strike team of Autobots on a mission deep into Decepticon territory.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus begins to rebel against Megatron's commands.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee loses vehicle mode and questions his place on the team.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee discovers that the unlikely alliance of MECH and Starscream are behind his recent woes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 3
programme.desc: The Decepticons prepare to leave Earth, outnumbering Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Presumed to be defeated, the Decepticons have returned!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Marvelous Toy: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Royal Drum: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing Out Of Time: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Memory Melon: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf For Denisa: Balthazar brings Denisa to Gargamel to baby-sit. But Gargamel loses Denisa in the wood and she and Sassette meet and become friends. Sassette and Denisa work together to free the Smurfs from Gargamel's stewpot, and prove you don't have to be big to be brave.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poltersmurf: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy And The Porridge Pot: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: The Rabbids are lost
programme.desc: A rabbid who got talent after having inhaled the air from a balloon, is suddenly destined to become a star!

programme.title: The Rabbids are fed up!

programme.title: The Rabbids are causing a stir
programme.desc: Two Rabbids fall asleep on an abandoned couch.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: Dennis the Menance and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis the Menance and Gnasher - Dennis the Menance and Gnasher S4 EP2: Dennis the Menace gets up to extreme fun and mischief with his friends, Pieface and Curly.

programme.title: Dennis the Menance and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis the Menance and Gnasher - Dennis the Menance and Gnasher S4 EP4: Dennis the Menace gets up to extreme fun and mischief with his friends, Pieface and Curly.

programme.desc: Dennis the Menance and Gnasher - Dennis the Menance and Gnasher S4 EP5: Dennis the Menace gets up to extreme fun and mischief with his friends, Pieface and Curly.

programme.title: Dennis the Menance and Gnasher

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home, Robotnik finds out, and creates a robot fox family which poses as Tails' long lost parents. Sonic leaves Tails with the fox family, but finally realizes they're robots and rescues Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: An elderly, out of shape, overweight superhero keeps trying to help Sonic battle Dr. Robotnik, and keeps getting him in more jepordy. Sonic helps the old hero regain his self respect and they team up to battle Robotnik's latest scheme.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: After an accident, Scratch thinks he's an eagle and on the side of Sonic. In order to impress his his new lady love, Scratch assists Sonic in an excursion into Robotnik's Fortress to turn off a dangerous force field.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic turns detective to solve the mystery of his missing Red Sneakers--and just in time to get them back and stop Dr. Robotnik's latest attack on a peaceful Mobius village.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: SONIC X The Last Resort
programme.desc: After Chris, Amy, Cream and Cheese arrive at a resort, Eggman appears and tries to take over with his E-39 but Sonic arrives and tries to stop him. However Sonic is unable to swim, and the robot tries to drag him into the ocean!

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: King K. Rool finds out that someone can get weak by having its hair cut and creates the Candy Clone robot in order to cut Donkey Kong's hair and remove his strength.

programme.title: SONIC X Unfair Ball
programme.desc: It's Team Sonic vs Team Eggman in a game of baseball for a Chaos Emerald! Team Sonic falls behind at first but then wins with a Sonic super-play, only to have Eggman to cheat and try to steal the Emerald regardless!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Ape Foo Young
programme.desc: Cranky creates a youth potion, so he can take care of the Crystal Coconut himself. Donkey Kong accidentally drinks it, making him become a baby ape.

programme.title: SONIC X Fly Spy
programme.desc: The President plants a fake emerald to try and attract Sonic but Rouge takes the bait instead. She winds up being hired by the Government to search inside Eggman's base with another agent, Topaz. Their search was going well, until they encountered the E-70!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Booty and the Beast
programme.desc: Kaptain Skurvy and his crew invade Kongo Bongo Island and keep Donkey Kong and Diddy in their ship and tries to steal the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: SONIC X Beating Eggman Part 1
programme.desc: Tails and Chris discover the third Chaos Emerald in a field and fly for it in the X-Tornado, but Eggman and E-51 catch up and trap them! Meanwhile, Rouge and Topaz launch an attack on Eggman's base.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Barrel, Barrel... Who's Got the Barrel
programme.desc: Bluster tries to impress Candy by getting a ridiculous toupee, but when that doesn't work, he tries to steal the Crystal Coconut. Meanwhile, King K. Rool tries to build a spy satellite.

programme.title: SONIC X The Last Resort
programme.desc: After Chris, Amy, Cream and Cheese arrive at a resort, Eggman appears and tries to take over with his E-39 but Sonic arrives and tries to stop him. However Sonic is unable to swim, and the robot tries to drag him into the ocean!

programme.title: Spree
programme.desc: Meet Kurt Kunkle, a 23-year-old rideshare driver so desperate for social media attention, he'll stop at nothing to go viral. Kurt comes up with a plan to broadcast a killing spree as a shortcut to infamy.

programme.title: Valley Girl
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage ("Vampire's Kiss") and Deborah Foreman ("The Destroyer") star in the totally awesome comedy "Valley Girl!" When Julie (Foreman) dumps her preppy boyfriend, the last thing she expects is to find love with the rockin' Randy (Cage).

programme.title: Good Luck Chuck
programme.desc: Meet Charlie Logan, he's a good luck charm and women are guaranteed to find true love after they sleep with him. But what seems like a blessing feels like a curse when he meets Cam, the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: In this classic romantic comedy, a Brooklyn widow (Cher) is ready to get married again. Only this time, she plans on doing it right, even if she has to say “yes” to a man she doesn't really love.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Hilarity, romance, and transcendence prevail after a power outage traps six different groups of New Yorkers inside elevators on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Christmas Sitters
programme.desc: When holiday flight delays strand two parents, they double-book clashing babysitters: mom's uptight lawyer friend Nora and dad's laid-back musician brother Max. Sparks fly as chaos turns to chemistry—could a Christmas miracle be in the air?

programme.title: Holiday Joy
programme.desc: Joy Hockstatter has been trying to help her Dad, Bob, hold the family together after her Mother's death a few years earlier.

programme.title: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: After unexpectedly moving to Alaska, an ambitious doctor starts a new romance and learns that her small town is hiding a holiday secret.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: Three American paratroopers team up with resistance fighters in France to take on invading German army. Starring Corbin Allred and Jasen Wade (2012).

programme.title: Operation Cross Eagles
programme.desc: (1968) Thrilling war drama with Richard Conte and Rory Calhoun. Set in WWII, a small team of US commandos have to save an American Captain from the clutches of the German army.

programme.title: WILD WIND
programme.desc: An allied commando unit is created to destroy a train loaded with Nazi soldiers during World War Two

programme.title: Alone We Fight
programme.desc: A small band of American solders in World War Two venture behind enemy lines to try and stop the German advance from breaking through the Allied lines. Starring Corbin Bernsen (2018)

programme.title: Hell River
programme.desc: (1974) Drama starring Rod Taylor and Adam West. Tensions build as partisans in Yugoslavia clash with Germans who invaded their homeland until the climactic battle at Hell River.

programme.title: Waiting...
programme.desc: Young employees at Shenaniganz restaurant collectively stave off boredom and adulthood with their antics.

programme.title: An American Werewolf in London
programme.desc: Two American college students in London are bitten by a wolf with terrifying results -- one is killed while the other begins to have nightmares and starts to receive visits from his mutilated friend's ghost.

programme.title: Conan The Barbarian
programme.desc: The most legendary Barbarian of all time is back. A quest that begins as a personal vendetta for the fierce Cimmerian warrior soon turns into an epic battle against hulking rivals, horrific monsters, and impossible odds, as Conan realizes he is the only hope of saving the great nations of Hyboria.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: The youngest son (Hardy) of an alcoholic former boxer (Nolte) returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament -- a path that puts the fighter on a collision corner with his older brother (Edgerton).

programme.title: Don't Say A Word
programme.desc: When the daughter of a psychiatrist is kidnapped, he's horrified to discover that the abductors' demand is that he break through to a post traumatic stress disorder suffering young woman who knows a secret...

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration
programme.desc: When terrorists are about to cause a nuclear disaster at Chernobyl, the only one who can stop them is Luc Deveraux, a retired Universal Soldier.

programme.title: My Dad is Scrooge
programme.desc: The animals of Woodsley's Farm help Oliver and his little sister June stage the classic tale of A Christmas Carol to shock their Dad into embracing the spirit of the holidays.

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: After Lily rejects her boyfriend's marriage proposal, she returns home to Hawaii where she must help out with her mother's wedding planning business.

programme.title: Captain Sharky
programme.desc: Pint-sized swashbuckler Captain Sharky thinks he's the most dangerous pirate on the Seven Seas. To prove his bravery, he sets sail with Mikey, a well-behaved boy whose life Sharky has turned upside down, and Bonnie, a trouble-shooting girl who tends to assume command in every situation. This motley crew sails for big adventures as they thwart the plans of The Admiral and Old Bill the Pirate.

programme.title: Runner, Runner
programme.desc: A college student (Justin Timberlake) takes the ultimate gamble when he goes to Costa Rica to confront the online gaming tycoon (Ben Affleck) who cheated him out of his winnings.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: The tale of Conan the Cimmerian and his adventures across the continent of Hyboria on a quest to avenge the murder of his father and the slaughter of his village.

programme.title: Black Dynamite
programme.desc: Black Dynamite is a 2009 American blaxploitation action comedy film starring Michael Jai White, Tommy Davidson, and Salli Richardson. The film was directed by Scott Sanders and co-written by White, Sanders, and Byron Minns, who also co-stars.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: The Kid
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who witnesses Billy the Kid's encounter with Sheriff Pat Garrett.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: A mother fights to defend her family from being massacred at the hands of a ruthless and violent gang.

programme.title: The Way of the Gun
programme.desc: Two criminals get more than they bargained for after kidnapping the surrogate mom of a powerful and shady man.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A pill that enables a user to access 100% of his brain transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard.

programme.title: 3 Day Christmas
programme.desc: Martin Taylor has totally lost touch with his family. He has no clue who his teenage daughter's friends are, why his son only communicates with an electronic sign outside his bedroom door, or why his youngest child watches so much TV. Convinced the family needs to reconnect, Martin surprises the wife and kids with a little experiment-he locks them in their own home with no power, no heat, no running water, and absolutely no contact with the world outside! The sudden holiday staycation isn't what the Taylors had in mind for Christmas, but they'll have to team up to prove they can survive Dad's wacky mission and their wackier relatives. With a little planning and a whole lot of love, this just might turn into the best Taylor family Christmas yet!

programme.title: A Miracle on Christmas Lake
programme.desc: After the loss of his best friend on Christmas Eve, Bobby goes out onto the lake and makes a shocking discovery. When the land is bought, Bobby must rally the town to save it.

programme.title: Santa Stole Our Dog
programme.desc: A magical holiday adventure featuring original Christmas songs by Dolly Parton, and starring Golden Globe winner, Ed Asner (Elf, Up). The Whitehaven family embark on a whirlwind adventure to the North Pole when their beloved dog, Rusty, goes missing on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Christmas With a Crown
programme.desc: When a successful woman returns to her hometown to revive her family's Christmas festival, she meets a dashing stranger who's volunteered to help organise the event. Sparks begin to fly between them, but little does she know that he's really a prince in disguise, longing to find the true spirit of the holidays! It will take a Christmas miracle of royal proportions for their hearts to meet as one.

programme.title: Infernal
programme.desc: In the vein of The Omen and Insidious, this dark horror is set to petrify! Newlyweds Nathan and Sophia are looking ahead to their bright future, but are unaware of the darkness that is about to entail. When their first child Imogene begins exhibiting strange and demonic behaviour, their future is left uncertain as they desperately search for answers to free their daughter. Deeply disturbing!

programme.title: Initiation
programme.desc: Carefree partying turns sinister in this edgy slasher that sees Whiton University unravel on the night a star-athlete is murdered in the wake of a buried assault allegation. As a masked killer targets students, a trio of sorority sisters race to uncover the schools dark secrets. Starring Yancy Butler (Kick-Ass), Lochlyn Munro (Riverdale) and Jon Huertas (This Is Us).

programme.title: A Good Woman is Hard to Find
programme.desc: A dynamic killer thriller, firmly on the pulses of stark social commentary, Abner Pastoll (director of Road Games) crafts a dazzling, dark and daring journey through Northern Irelands criminal underbelly. Widowed Sarah (tour de force Sarah Bolger: Emelie) is desperate to know who murdered her husband. Coerced into helping a drug-dealer, she takes drastic action to protect her kids.

programme.title: Extra Time
programme.desc: Former football star Troy is coaxed into rescuing the local footy team who have been told they will have to merge with a rival club or fold. Troy takes the controversial decision to team up with a nearby refugee support centre and take the community on a journey of change. But for some, it proves challenging. A hilarious and heart-felt comedy described as The Full Monty for the football pitch.

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: Victoria is in Paris for friend's wedding, but she needs a date to make her ex believe she's over him, will Jacques her childhood French pen pal assist her in this ruse? (2021)

programme.title: Snapshot Of Love
programme.desc: Adrian is a Hollywood paparazzi assigned to get photos of a very elusive star, Parker Bennett. Little does she know, she'll get her chance when they both end up at the same BnB in the mountains of NC.

programme.title: This Little Love Of Mine
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer returns to her island home to convince an old friend to take over his family's company - but rekindled feelings soon get in the way.

programme.title: Tell Me I Love You
programme.desc: Desperate for money, three best friends devise an outrageous plan to get married and inherit money from a trust fund. Starring Kaniehtiio Horn (2019)

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: (2021) Romantic comedy starring Autumn Reeser. A workaholic wellness mogul goes on a retreat in Montana, where she discovers that slowing down might just be the key to finding inner peace - and love.

programme.title: A Case Of You
programme.desc: A young writer (Justin Long) woos a cute and quirky barista (Evan Rachel Wood) by studying her Facebook profile and making himself into the man of her dreams. When she falls for his alter ego, he must keep up the act or risk losing her.

programme.title: Guess Who
programme.desc: A sarcastic father (Bernie Mac) has plenty to say about his daughter wanting to marry a white boy (Ashton Kutcher).

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking & optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly's life as a last minute replacement host.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: A Song for Christmas
programme.desc: Two single parents stumble into the possibility of love for Christmas, only to discover that their daughters are embroiled in a rivalry at school. When the rivalry gets out of control, can hope and healing lead everyone to a peaceful and merry Christmas?

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: Ill Be Homeless for Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: Moving McAllister
programme.desc: Rick Robinson is a ladder-climbing law intern from Miami with four days until the Bar Exam. Desperate to score points with his boss (McAllister), he commits to a favor he can't afford. He ends up in a rundown truck headed to L.A. with his boss's possessions, his Hollywood-bound niece, and her pet pig. Amidst hitch-hikers, breakdowns, and assorted local yokels, Rick finds love, life and maybe himself in this trans-American road trip from hell.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: Abandoned by her husband a few days before Christmas, Martha Evans travels cross-country with the kids in search of work.

programme.title: Love, Alaska
programme.desc: When two childhood friends are reunited through a generous inheritance that bestows far more on their broken hearts than they bargained for - a second chance at love.

programme.title: Not Cinderella's Type
programme.desc: Indy lives with her aunt and uncle and believes her life is fine until an accident brings a new guy into her life. Bryant Bailey is not Indy's type - she's never been into guys like him. But then again, she's never really known anyone so stubborn and caring that can also help her discover who she is and what she's worth. A modern telling of Cinderella, based on the novel by Jenni James.

programme.title: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: Holly Logan returns to Gulfport for a Christmas light show.

programme.title: Reba McEntire's Christmas in Tune
programme.desc: Georgia and Joe reunite for their daughter Belle's Christmas Charity concert.

programme.title: Holiday in Your Heart
programme.desc: 14-year-old LeAnn Rimes sings at Nashville concert, faces tough family decision.

programme.title: My Christmas Grandpa
programme.desc: Girl requests cashier as grandpa for Christmas Vivica A. Fox, Bill Cobbs star.

programme.title: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: Holly Logan returns to Gulfport for a Christmas light show.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Paintings made on canvasses possessed by a dead painter serve as a portal for him to enter and commit murders.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: At the Gamma Christmas Mixer, Sarah is missing and her friends' search leads to a shocking attack.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Most leave for break, while a few stay behind. Rick is pushed to his breaking point and flips out on Allison.

programme.title: The Wrong Husband
programme.desc: Melanie discovers her husband is actually his twin, Alex, back to steal his life—and willing to kill for it.

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: A TV host must choose between chasing ratings or following her heart when she falls for a handsome guest.

programme.title: Murder at the Mansion
programme.desc: As her wedding day approaches, a woman uncovers some deadly secrets hidden at her fiancé's lush family estate.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jennifer Aniston and Gerard Butler, two exes continually one-up each other until they find themselves on the run for their lives.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) meets the girl of his dreams (Brooklyn Decker) but has to enlist his loyal assistant Katherine (Jennifer Aniston) to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie. When more lies backfire, Katherine's kids become involved, and everyone heads off to Hawaii for a ridiculous, out-of-control weekend that tests the limits of how far we'll go for love.

programme.title: The Animal
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five friends get a beach house in Miami for a wild bachelorette weekend that goes completely off the rails.

programme.title: I Spy
programme.desc: A professional boxer (Eddie Murphy) has to help a U.S. government agent recover a missing jet.

programme.title: The Avenging Angel
programme.desc: Miles Utley, a skilled Mormon commando and bodyguard, is forced to go rogue while investigating a deadly scandal of assassination and land speculation. As danger mounts, he must confront his beliefs and decide where his true loyalties lie in a world of betrayal and faith.

programme.title: Rimfire
programme.desc: Captain Tom Harvey, an undercover army agent, investigates stolen army gold shipments. Posing as a deputy sheriff, he is drawn into solving the mystery of a ghost haunting the town. The ghost is believed to be the spirit of a gambler wrongly hanged for the thefts. Harvey's investigation leads him to uncover a dark truth behind the ghostly terror.

programme.title: Pray to God and Dig Your Grave
programme.desc: Fernando returns from exile in Texas seeking revenge for his siblings' deaths. But instead of personal vengeance, he's driven to spark a revolution against the oppressive landowners, transforming his mission into a fight for justice and freedom.

programme.title: Lightning Jack
programme.desc: Lightning Jack Kane is an Australian outlaw in the wild west. During a bungled bank robbery he picks up mute Ben Doyle as a hostage. The two become good friends, with Jack teaching Ben how to rob banks, while they plan Jack's last heist.

programme.title: Bitter Harvest
programme.desc: Young Jennie Jones leaves her quiet, dull home in Wales to seek a glamorous life in 1960s London. But knowing what she wants from life itself and how to get it does not turn out quite as she expects. Starring Janet Munro and John Stride.

programme.desc: David Balfour is a recently orphaned young man from a tiny Highland village and the true heir to the title of Master of the Shaws. His uncle Ebenezer has designs on the title so hires Captain Hosean to dispose of his nephew.

programme.desc: A talented but obese girl, who ghost-sings for a not-so-talented pop star, undergoes extensive plastic surgery to become a slender beauty with a new identity.

When the trip becomes increasingly dangerous, due to floods, capsized boats and gigantic, ill-tempered anacondas, Byron refuses to allow his crew to end the expedition, and resorts to foul play in order to keep them on the trail.
